content_body: We had the best time at Creekside Green! The process was simple, check-in and check-out were a breeze and the home provided everything we needed! I usually rent through an app but there are so many risks. The cabin provided everything we needed and more! We were more than comfortable and the board games provided us with hours of entertainment. Other than the power briefly going out due to a summer storm, everything was absolutely perfect. The neighbors were so nice and helpful and evening visits from the neighbors puppy just made it so awesome! Thank you to you and the CRG team for making this process so simple and easy! Renting through CRG took all of the stress out of it so we could enjoy the entire trip. Will definitely be renting through CRG again!
title: Will Be Renting Again!
